title: Hoofdstuk 9 - Box sizing en borders Check
description: Controleer je kennis:  Hoe borders en box-sizing je layout beÃ¯nvloeden.

options.label: It includes padding and border in width and height
It doubles the size of the element

explanations.overview: It includes padding and border inside the set width and height.

byOptionId.a: Not quite. It includes padding and border inside the set width and height.
byOptionId.b: Correct. It includes padding and border inside the set width and height.

questions.prompt: With default box-sizing (content-box), what happens when you add a thick border?

options.label: Total element size can become larger
Border does not affect size at all

explanations.overview: The total rendered size gets larger because border is added outside content size.

byOptionId.a: Correct. The total rendered size gets larger because border is added outside content size.
byOptionId.b: Not quite. The total rendered size gets larger because border is added outside content size.
byOptionId.c: Not quite. The total rendered size gets larger because border is added outside content size.
byOptionId.d: Not quite. The total rendered size gets larger because border is added outside content size.
